message:
test: Add thread-safe env var helpers and fix flaky core estimation test

Adds utilities for safe environment variable manipulation in tests:

New Helpers:
- env_lock(): Serializes tests that modify environment variables
- set_env()/remove_env(): Unsafe wrappers with SAFETY comments
- EnvVarGuard: RAII guard that restores env vars on drop
  - EnvVarGuard::remove(key): Removes var and restores on drop

Test Fixes:
- test_estimate_cores_for_command now acquires env_lock
- Removes CARGO_BUILD_JOBS and RUST_TEST_THREADS during test
- Ensures deterministic core estimation regardless of env state

This fixes flaky test failures when env vars from parallel tests
or the host environment affected core estimation calculations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
